Also, torch.nn.ReflectionPad1d operates on the last dimension (N, C, L) → pads L-dim, so tf.pad must pad the last axis — but the current paddings [[0,0],[0,0],[3,1]] is correct in structure; however, the call site likely omitted the mandatory 'paddings' positional argument or passed it as keyword in an unsupported way.
